title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Who’s-Who, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Ulti as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yeah!! Crush him, who's who- same!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The flying six are unreal! Even a former warlord is no match!!

dialogue.speaker: Who’s-Who
dialogue.text: The guard who told me about Nika...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: vanished a few days later, without a trace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I figured that maybe the story wasn't meant to be shared...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And hearing it put me in danger too, so I risked my life to break out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's curious, isn't it?! I'd love to hear what you know!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I have nothing to say to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I have a few more of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm gonna gouge you in half!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dammit!! Why're you so mad all of a sudden!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're going to make broad statements about other people's history...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...you'd better not be half-assed about it!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 30 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
